title: Vaishno Devi Temple
tagline: Vaishno Devi Temple — spiritual town of Jammu & Kashmir

overview.short: Vaishno Devi Temple, also known as the Shri Mata Vaishno Devi Temple and Vaishno Devi Bhavan, is a Hindu temple in Katra, Reasi district, Jammu and Kashmir.
overview.description: Vaishno Devi Temple, also known as the Shri Mata Vaishno Devi Temple and Vaishno Devi Bhavan, is a Hindu temple in Katra, Reasi district, Jammu and Kashmir. Dedicated to Vaishno Devi, a manifestation of goddesses Mahakali, Mahalakshmi, and Mahasarasvati, it is on Trikuta mountain at an elevation of 5,200 feet (1,500 meters). The temple is 43 km from the main city of Jammu and 29 km from the district headquarters Reasi town. The temple is governed by the Shri Mata Vaishno Devi Shrine Board (SMVDSB) and has been chaired by the Governor of Jammu and Kashmir since August 1986.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Vaishno Devi Temple stampede
topPlaces.description: On 1 January 2022, 12 people were killed and 16 others injured in a crowd crush near to Gate No. 3 at the Vaishno Devi Temple in Katra, Jammu and Kashmir, northern India.

topPlaces.name: Vaishnodevi Temple, Rourkela
topPlaces.description: Vaishnodevi Temple at Rourkela is a replica of the original Temple of Vaishnodevi of Jammu (Trikuta Hills) and is situated on the top of the Durgapur Hill facing towards Rourkela Steel Plant. Bhairabanath Temple is situated near Vaishodevi Temple on the hill.

topPlaces.name: Ardhkuwari
topPlaces.description: Ardhkuwari (also spelled Adhkwari or Adi Kumari) is a major holy site and the main resting point on the walk to the Mata Vaishno Devi shrine. It is located in the Trikuta Mountains of Jammu and Kashmir , India.

topPlaces.name: Katra, Jammu and Kashmir
topPlaces.description: Katra or Vaishno Devi is a city and Tehsil in the Reasi district of the Indian union territory of Jammu and Kashmir. It is situated at the foot of the Trikuta Mountains, where the shrine of Vaishno Devi is located.

topPlaces.name: Anji Khad Bridge
topPlaces.description: The Anji Khad bridge is a railway bridge over the Anji River, a tributary of Chenab River, in the Indian union territory of Jammu and Kashmir. The bridge spans a length of 725.5 m (2,380 ft) with the 473.25 m (1,552.7 ft) long cable stayed bridge forming the main segment across the river gorge.

topPlaces.name: Baba Dhansar
topPlaces.description: The holy place of Baba Dhansar is located at Karua Jheel (pond) near village Karua, 17 km from Reasi towards Katra in Reasi district of Jammu & Kashmir State, India. The approach involves a walk of 200 metres from the road.

topPlaces.name: Deva Mai Temple
topPlaces.description: Deva Mai (also known as Deva Maai) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the Divine Mother, about 4 kilometres outside Katra in the Reasi district of Jammu and Kashmir, India. Situated in the Siwalik Hills, it is reached via a 3.5 km detour from the main Jammu-Katra highway.

itinerary.title: Day 2 — Katra, Jammu and Kashmir & around

items.note: Katra or Vaishno Devi is a city and Tehsil in the Reasi district of the Indian union territory of Jammu and Kashmir. It is situated at the foot of the Trikuta Mountains, where the shrine of Vaishno Devi is located.

Deva Mai (also known as Deva Maai) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the Divine Mother, about 4 kilometres outside Katra in the Reasi district of Jammu and Kashmir, India. Situated in the Siwalik Hills, it is reached via a 3.5 km detour from the main Jammu-Katra highway.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vaishno Devi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vaishno Devi Temple is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vaishno Devi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jammu Airport (39 km) and the nearest railway station is Katra (Vaishno Devi railhead) (5 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vaishno Devi Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vaishno Devi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vaishno Devi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vaishno Devi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vaishno Devi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vaishno Devi Temple stampede, Vaishnodevi Temple, Rourkela, Ardhkuwari, Katra, Jammu and Kashmir, Anji Khad Bridge.
